subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Whom none can truly know, for knowledge of Thee can never be joined with any knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی لن یعرفک من احد لان عرفانک لن یقترن بعرفان
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Word of God and human limitations
